description: A broadcast needs to produce a pre-recorded interview with a star player to air during a pre-game show.

nodes.task_description: Schedule the interview with the player and a reporter.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds a suitable time and books the interview.

nodes.task_description: After the interview is filmed, ingest the raw footage.

expected_outcome.value: Agent loads the footage into the editing system.

nodes.task_description: Edit the interview down to a 3-minute segment, adding graphics and background music.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces the final, ready-to-air video segment.
